canva.plan: Free (Canva free account; Pro optional, not required here)
canva.signup: https://www.canva.com → sign up / log in, then connect Canva inside Claude when prompted
canva.spend: Free. A Canva account is all you need.
canva.verify: Canva MCP responds (Claude calls a Canva tool and it returns)
canva.where: Browser login (OAuth). No key to paste, nothing goes in .env.

cloudflare.signup: https://dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up → then My Profile → API Tokens → Create Custom Token (Account / Cloudflare Pages: Edit)
cloudflare.spend: Free tier covers everything here (500 builds/month, 100 custom domains per project)
cloudflare.where: API token into CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN; Account ID (right sidebar on any domain/Pages page) into CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, in .env

gmail-mcp.plan: Phase-2 capability - needs an email connection set up with your builder

higgsfield.signup: https://higgsfield.ai -> Sign up -> pick a plan -> higgsfield auth login
higgsfield.spend: Paid credits. Cheap-first defaults on. Cap: HF_MONTHLY_CAP in .env
higgsfield.where: Account page, after you pick a plan

nano-banana.spend: Free tier. The cheapest creative tool, default for hero shots.

publer.plan: Free if its API and Instagram publish are free on your plan; otherwise paid
publer.signup: https://publer.com → connect Instagram → Settings → Access → API key
